caption: A person with blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt is visible in a picture-in-picture overlay at the bottom left of a gameplay recording for "MADDEN NFL 23". The game depicts an American football match in a large stadium under bright lights, with "ULTIMATE TEAM" and "UT" logos displayed on electronic banners. A scoreboard at the top reads "MADDEN NFL 23", showing a score of "14" to "7", with the time at "4:00" in the "3rd" quarter. In the initial scene, players in black uniforms are running across a green field toward the end zone. As the sequence progresses, the view shifts to follow players in white uniforms. One player in a white jersey, wearing number 11, is highlighted by a red circular cursor as they move across the field. The person in the overlay remains present throughout, observing the game.
